description_long: This is a single grave plot featuring a polished stone headstone and a matching stone slab covering the grave. The headstone is upright and rectangular, with a gold-colored Latin cross and engraved inscriptions visible on its front face. The grave is bordered by a low stone curb, and a black cylindrical vase or candle holder is positioned near the head of the grave. The entire grave is set on a rectangular paved base, which separates it from the surrounding ground. The stone surfaces have a light gray, marbled appearance, suggesting the use of granite or marble. The overall design is simple yet dignified, typical of modern urban cemeteries.
description: A polished stone grave with an upright headstone, gold cross, engraved inscriptions, and a black vase, all set on a paved base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the headstone with a gold cross, engraved text, and the black vase near the head of the grave.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the headstone, the length of the grave slab, and the position of the vase.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the headstone and the full outline of the grave's stone border.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the headstone's profile and the black vase at the head of the grave.
